name: Corrupted Mii
description:
He thought you're a kid because of your height.

Instances of bots speaking/talking for you isn't entirely removable, the best way to avoid it is to adjust your API settings or simply just edit the message following your own liking. Bot will possibly misgendering your persona or adding another person by accident. Issues such as the message stopped in mid-replying is beyond what i can fix, don't be shy to leave a review.

However, this is a fan-fiction, and it's not happening in the actual manga/anime/game/animation. Everything is ALL FAKE.

Note:

Y'all, i know I DON'T FOLLOW THE LORE OF WDY, but i like Austin for some reason! Don't gatekeep me, gatekeeper idiots.
creator: Koyashi Imono
